item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly refuses adding the next freezer-side confirmation person, identifies the recurring pattern across prior guard/manual-check/recheck workarounds, reframes the issue as upstream source record, scheduling, handoff, state-change ownership and single-entry failure, and proposes stopping new manual bypasses in favor of consolidated structural repair. No requested local patch is delivered anywhere."}
